{{Quote|Jedi General Empatojayos Brand's twilight push against the Separatists holed in the Agao Ranges has won the twelve-day Battle of Bassadro.|[[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]]|<ref name="Insider65" />}}
The '''Battle of Bassadro''', also known as the '''Bassadro Massacre''', was a twelve day battle fought during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Prelude==
The [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] invaded [[Bassadro]] during the early stages of the Clone Wars, securing the planet's mining resources.<ref name="Insider65" />

==The battle==
{{Quote|The clones began firing at the natural rock formations surrounding the Bassadroan village, and the Jedi General would order cease-fire only upon Treetor's surrender. The barrage of anti-armor concussion missiles into the razor-sharp obsidian created a deadly storm of shrapnel that sliced through the mining village. The airborne rock fragments also damaged many CIS assets under Treetor's command.|[[Shadowfeed/Legends|CIS Shadowfeed]]|<ref name="Shadowfeed">{{InsiderCite|65|CIS Shadowfeed Dispatch 14:2:14 Edition}}</ref>}}
The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] responded by sending [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Empatojayos Brand]] and his [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] armored [[Battalion/Legends|battalion]] to retake the planet. They fought a twelve-day battle in the [[Agao Ranges]].<ref name="Insider65" /> General Brand led his battalion to the dormant volcanic ranges that offered cover for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces commanded by [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Domb Treetor]]. Brand ordered [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] strikes against the rock formations,<ref name="Insider65" /><ref name="Insider66" /> creating a storm of shrapnel that sliced through the mining village of [[Agao-Nir]],<ref name="Insider66" /> wiping out almost every battle droid stationed there. Utterly defeated, Major Treetor surrendered to the Republic.<ref name="Insider65" /><ref name="Insider66" />

The [[Ailon Nova Guard/Legends|Ailon Nova Guard]] served on the Republic side during the battle and was critical of the Jedi leadership, feeling they were too lenient.<ref name="GaW" />

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|The callous lack of value shown by the Republic in this exercise is appalling. Each of those miners represented a hard worker with invested skill levels. The synergistic aggregate of the village total was far beyond the worth of each individual.|[[Shu Mai/Legends|Shu Mai]]|<ref name="Shadowfeed" />}}
News of Treetor's surrender was broadcast on Republic [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] channels,<ref name="Insider65" /> though the Separatists were quick to ensure reporters knew their reason for the Major's surrender—supposedly, Domb Treetor surrendered to Brand only to save the citizens of Agao and other nearby settlements from further warfare.<ref name="Insider66" />
